name: She Money Pawn
description_short: She Money Pawn is a pawn shop located in Tampa, FL offering collateral-based loans and buying/selling of items. Open seven days a week with extended hours.
description_long:
She Money Pawn operates as a pawn shop in Tampa, Florida, serving the local community with typical pawn shop services. The business is located at 901 East 124th Avenue and maintains consistent operating hours throughout the week. Like other pawn shops in the Tampa area, it functions as a financial service provider for consumers seeking quick access to cash through collateral-based transactions.

The shop offers standard pawn shop services including pawning items for short-term loans, buying merchandise outright, and selling pre-owned goods. Based on industry-standard pawn shop operations and related content on their listing platform, customers can expect to pawn or sell various categories of items including tools, jewelry, electronics, collectibles, and other valuables. The business model allows customers to either pledge items as collateral for loans or sell items for immediate cash.

She Money Pawn distinguishes itself through its seven-day-a-week availability with consistent 11:00 AM - 7:00 PM hours, providing accessibility that matches or exceeds many competing pawn shops in the Tampa area. The business operates in a competitive market with numerous nearby pawn shops, yet maintains its own storefront location on East 124th Avenue. The extended daily hours accommodate customers with varying schedules.

Prospective customers should note that specific details about interest rates, loan terms, fees, and merchandise categories accepted are not available on the public listing. The shop has no customer reviews posted yet, making it difficult to assess customer satisfaction or experience quality. As with all pawn transactions, borrowers should carefully review loan terms and redemption deadlines before pawning items, and sellers should compare offers across multiple shops for valuable merchandise.
pros: Open seven days a week with extended hours (11 AM - 7 PM daily) for customer convenience
Located in Tampa with accessible address at 901 East 124th Avenue
Direct phone contact available at +1 813-770-5227 for inquiries before visiting
Operates in established pawn shop market with multiple nearby competitors for price comparison
Consistent operating schedule without day-to-day hour variations
Physical storefront location provides in-person service and immediate cash transactions
cons: No customer reviews available on listing to assess service quality or customer satisfaction
Specific interest rates, fees, and loan terms not disclosed on public profile
Limited information about which item categories are accepted or their valuation criteria
No website or online presence beyond the Pawn Shop Map listing for additional details
Competes with numerous nearby pawn shops with potentially better-known brands and customer bases
best_for: Tampa-area residents needing immediate cash through collateral-based loans
Sellers looking to convert unwanted items into quick cash without lengthy selling processes
Consumers seeking pawn services with convenient seven-day weekly access
diagnosis: She Money Pawn is best for Tampa residents who need quick cash through pawning items or immediate payment for selling merchandise, and who value seven-day-a-week availability. The main caveat is the complete lack of public information about loan terms, interest rates, fees, and accepted merchandise categories—customers must call or visit in person to understand the specific terms and should compare offers across the numerous competing pawn shops in the area.
services: Pawn loans using personal items as collateral
Jewelry transactions (based on industry standards for pawn shops)
Tool and equipment pawning and sales
Immediate cash payments for sold items
